screen.title: Notifications
empty.title: No notifications yet
empty.subtitle: You'll see updates here when things happen in your trips.
preferences.title: Push Notifications
nudge.democracy.title: Democracy calls!
nudge.democracy.body: Are you in favor of dictatorships? If not, vote now!
nudge.nearby.title: Votes nearby!
nudge.nearby.body: Three members already voted. Now it's your turn!
nudge.waiting.title: We're waiting on you...
nudge.waiting.body: The group is ready to move forward — just needs your vote!
nudge.fomo.title: Don't miss out!
nudge.fomo.body: Big trip decisions are being made. Have your say before it's too late.
nudge.quick.title: Quick reminder!
nudge.quick.body: There are still open votes on the trip. Takes 10 seconds, promise.
nudge.captain.title: Captain speaking ✈️
nudge.captain.body: This is your reminder that votes are still open. Over and out.
nudge.team.title: Team effort needed!
nudge.team.body: This trip plans itself — except for the voting part. That's on you.
nudge.nudge.title: Friendly nudge 👋
nudge.nudge.body: Hey! There's still stuff to vote on. We believe in you.
toast.nudgeRateLimited: Too many nudges — max 3 per hour.
